name: Holderkuechle (Elderberry Fritters)
recipeIngredient: 750 g Lard or Shortening for Frying (1 lb 11 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, salt, and milk until the batter is smooth.
2. Rinse the elderberry blossoms several times, then pat them dry with paper towels.
3. Dip each blossom into the batter, coating it evenly.
4. Heat the lard or shortening in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 175°C (350°F).
5. Carefully lower the coated blossoms into the hot fat and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Remove the fritters with tongs or a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Dust with sugar while still hot.
8. Serve warm.
Serves 4.
